intro: STRUCTURES and general OB/GYN terms used in clinical communication.
reading: OB/GYN anatomy covers the reproductive organs (uterus, fallopian tubes, ovaries), the urinary structures interpreters often hear alongside them (urethra, ureters), and pregnancy/postpartum-specific structures like the amniotic sac and umbilical cord. Breast anatomy also falls under this topic during OB/GYN visits.

terms.example_en: The fallopian tubes carry the egg from the ovary to the uterus.
terms.example_ru: Маточные трубки переносят яйцеклетку из яичника в матку.
terms.note: A pair of narrow ducts that transport eggs from the ovaries to the uterus and are the typical site of fertilization.

terms.example_en: The ovaries produce eggs and hormones.
terms.example_ru: Яичники вырабатывают яйцеклетки и гормоны.
terms.note: A pair of small almond-shaped organs that produce and release eggs (ova) and secrete the sex hormones estrogen and progesterone.

terms.example_en: The ligament of ovary attaches the ovary to the uterus.
terms.example_ru: Связка яичника прикрепляет яичник к матке.
terms.note: A fibrous cord that anchors the medial pole of the ovary to the lateral wall of the uterus.

terms.example_en: The cervical canal connects the uterus to the vagina.
terms.example_ru: Цервикальный канал соединяет матку с влагалищем.
terms.note: The narrow passage running through the cervix that connects the uterine cavity to the vagina, through which menstrual blood exits and sperm enters.

terms.example_en: The endometrium thickens during the menstrual cycle.
terms.example_ru: Эндометрий утолщается во время менструального цикла.
terms.note: The inner mucous membrane lining the uterus that builds up each cycle in preparation for embryo implantation and sheds during menstruation if fertilization does not occur.

terms.example_en: The vagina is the birth canal.
terms.example_ru: Влагалище — это родовой канал.
terms.note: The muscular, elastic canal extending from the cervix to the external genitalia, serving as the birth canal and the passageway for menstrual flow.

terms.example_en: The vulva includes the external female genitalia.
terms.example_ru: Вульва включает наружные женские половые органы.
terms.note: The collective term for all external female genitalia, including the labia majora, labia minora, clitoris, and vaginal opening.

terms.example_en: The amniotic sac holds the fluid that cushions the fetus.
terms.example_ru: Амниотическая оболочка удерживает жидкость, которая защищает плод.
terms.note: A fluid-filled membranous sac made of two layers (amnion and chorion) that surrounds and protects the developing fetus throughout pregnancy.

terms.example_en: The amniotic fluid protects and cushions the developing fetus.
terms.example_ru: Амниотическая жидкость защищает и поддерживает развивающийся плод.
terms.note: The protective liquid inside the amniotic sac that cushions the fetus against physical shock, supports limb movement, and helps regulate temperature and lung development.

terms.example_en: The placenta transfers nutrients and oxygen to the fetus.
terms.example_ru: Плацента передает питательные вещества и кислород плоду.
terms.note: A temporary organ that attaches to the uterine wall during pregnancy, exchanging oxygen, nutrients, and waste between maternal and fetal blood via the umbilical cord.

terms.example_en: The cervix opens during labor to allow the baby to pass through.
terms.example_ru: Шейка матки расширяется во время родов, позволяя ребенку пройти.
terms.note: The lower, narrow portion of the uterus that protrudes into the vagina and gradually dilates during labor to allow delivery.

terms.example_en: The urethra carries urine out of the bladder.
terms.example_ru: Мочеиспускательный канал выводит мочу из мочевого пузыря.
terms.note: The tube that drains urine from the bladder to the outside; in females it is short (~4 cm) and opens just above the vaginal opening.

terms.example_en: The ureters connect the kidneys to the bladder.
terms.example_ru: Мочеточники соединяют почки с мочевым пузырём.
terms.note: Two muscular tubes, one from each kidney, that transport urine to the bladder via rhythmic peristaltic contractions.

terms.example_en: The uterus is where the fetus develops during pregnancy.
terms.example_ru: Матка — это орган, где развивается плод во время беременности.
terms.note: A hollow, thick-walled, pear-shaped muscular organ in the female pelvis where a fertilized egg implants and the fetus develops until birth.

terms.example_en: The mammary glands produce milk after childbirth.
terms.example_ru: Молочные железы вырабатывают молоко после родов.
terms.note: Modified sweat glands within the breast that produce and secrete milk in response to hormonal signals following childbirth.

terms.example_en: The nipple can become sore during breastfeeding.
terms.example_ru: Сосок может воспаляться во время грудного вскармливания.
terms.note: The small raised projection at the center of the breast through which milk is released during breastfeeding.

terms.example_en: A biopsy was taken from the nipple tissue.
terms.example_ru: Была взята биопсия ткани соска.
terms.note: The specialized tissue of the nipple and surrounding areola, containing smooth muscle, dense nerve endings, and lactiferous ducts that carry milk to the surface.

terms.example_en: The doctor examined the vaginal opening during the pelvic exam.
terms.example_ru: Врач осмотрел вход во влагалище во время гинекологического осмотра.
terms.note: The external orifice of the vagina, located between the urethral opening and the anus within the vulva.

terms.example_en: The clitoris is an external sexual organ located above the vaginal opening.
terms.example_ru: Клитор — это наружный орган, расположенный над входом во влагалища.
terms.note: A small erectile organ at the anterior junction of the labia minora, densely innervated and functionally analogous to the penis.

terms.example_en: The clitoral glans is highly sensitive.
terms.example_ru: Головка клитора очень чувствительна.
terms.note: The externally visible tip of the clitoris, covered by the clitoral hood, and containing the highest concentration of sensory nerve endings.

terms.example_en: The umbilical cord was clamped right after delivery.
terms.example_ru: Пуповину пережали сразу после родов.
terms.note: The flexible, rope-like structure connecting the fetus to the placenta, containing two arteries and one vein that carry blood, nutrients, and oxygen.

terms.example_en: Keep the umbilical stump clean and dry until it falls off.
terms.example_ru: Держите пуповинный остаток чистым и сухим, пока он не отпадёт.
terms.note: The small remnant of the umbilical cord left attached to the newborn's navel after clamping and cutting, which dries and falls off within 1–3 weeks.

terms.example_en: There was mild redness in the umbilical area.
terms.example_ru: В области пупка отмечалось лёгкое покраснение.
terms.note: The region of the abdomen surrounding the navel, commonly assessed in newborns for signs of infection or abnormal healing after cord separation.

terms.example_en: The baby's belly button healed within two weeks.
terms.example_ru: Пупок у ребёнка зажил в течение двух недель.
terms.note: The scar at the center of the abdomen marking the former attachment point of the umbilical cord.

terms.example_en: Colostrum is the first milk produced after birth.
terms.example_ru: Молозиво — это первое молоко, вырабатываемое после родов.
terms.note: The thick, yellowish, antibody-rich fluid produced by the mammary glands in the first few days postpartum, providing the newborn with passive immune protection.
